main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.07|1.07]] |gameversion=1.07 |date=September 24, 2024 |summary='''Terry Release'''. Minor balance changes and bug fixes. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/battle_change/20240924 Patch Notes] }} == Terry Patch == * Terry released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range (A.K.I., Chun-Li, Dee Jay, Kimberly, Luke) ** Fixed issues where absorbing an attack would affect the {{clr|DR|DI}} properties for some characters *** Blanka: proximity guard hitbox was shorter than usual, and the range on 2nd active frame was longer than usual *** Dee Jay: attack hitbox range became shorter than usual *** Kimberly: proximity guard hitbox would disappear on frames 1-17 * {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} ** Expanded the throw hurtbox to ensure all characters can punish with a throw at close range ** Because some characters lacked strong punish options at {{sf6-adv|VM|-6}} due to {{clr|L|Light}} normal starter scaling, this gives a universal option for meterless damage and Drive gauge depletion * Perfect Parry ** Fixed issue where, against specific projectile attacks with screen freeze properties, the player would incur the 10-frame recovery of a non-freeze Perfect Parry ** Applies to 2nd hit onward for JP's Stribog (236P) and Rashid's Arabian Cyclone (214P) * Modern Controls ** Fixed issue where 20% shortcut scaling would apply to manually input special moves during a screen freeze (e.g. {{clr|SA|Super}} freeze) * Assist Combos ** Fixed issues when entering Burnout during certain Assist Combos; using the same Assist Combo during the recovery or buffer window of the previous move would prevent the 2nd hit of the sequence from coming out ** Applies to {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} for Dhalsim, Juri, Luke, Kimberly, and Manon; {{clr|H|Assist Combo 3}} for JP, Juri, and Manon
== '''Key Character Changes''' == === '''A.K.I.''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range * {{clr|OD|OD Serpent Lash}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** Now applies {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} advantage to Toxic Blossom crumple ({{sf6-adv|VP|+9}} before opponent becomes airborne)
=== '''Akuma''' === * Gou Hadoken (236P) ** Fixed issue where regular projectiles could be performed while an {{clr|OD|OD}} projectile was still on-screen
=== '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where absorbing an attack caused the proximity guard hitbox range to be shorter than usual, and the 2nd active frame hitbox to be longer than usual * {{clr|OD|OD Electric Thunder}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}} during {{clr|SA|SA2}}) ** Fixed issue that would cause an activated Blanka-chan doll to detonate with standard projectile priority rather than {{clr|OD|OD}} priority
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range * {{clr|OD|OD Kikoken}} (Modern {{clr|OD|[4]6XX}}) ** Fixed issue where performing the manual input with Modern controls resulted in a regular Kikoken if any Down input was also used * {{clr|H|HK Tensho Kicks}} ({{clr|H|22HK}}) ** Increased knockdown time on the 1st hit (less likely to be punished if the opponent falls out between hits)
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|H|Face Breaker}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) ** Collision box changed to make {{clr|OD|OD Jus Cool}} juggles more consistent (specials should no longer come out in the wrong direction) * {{clr|M|Threebeat Combo 1}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** Reduced pushback on hit (keeps Dee Jay closer for the 3rd hit of the Target Combo for a strike/throw mixup) ** Recovery increased 18 → 20 ** Hitstun increased 23 → 25 and Blockstun increased 18 → 20 (no change to overall advantage) ** Hitconfirm window is 2f more lenient, making it possible to confirm a successful {{clr|M|MK}} after blocked {{clr|L|5LP}} ** Now applies 20% Starter scaling (e.g. blocked {{clr|L|5LP}} that frame traps into {{clr|M|MK}}) ** No longer forces stand on hit * {{clr|M|Threebeat Combo 2}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|M|MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** Recovery decreased 21 → 19 ** Hitstun decreased 27 → 25 and Blockstun decreased 16 → 14 (no change to overall advantage) ** Hitstop increased 9 → 11 (keeps the timing consistent for both players after the final hit despite the hitstun/blockstun changes) * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range ** Fixed issue where absorbing an attack caused the attack hitbox range to be shorter than usual * Jackknife Maximum ([2]8K) ** Initial hitbox expanded downward for consistency against moves with low-profile landing recovery (e.g. Juri's j.214K) * {{clr|M|Waning Moon}} ({{clr|M|214K~MK}}) ** Drive Damage on Block increased 4000 → 6000 ** {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} now causes a ground bounce ** 30% Starter scaling applied * {{clr|OD|OD Waning Moon}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) ** Now causes ground bounce vs. airborne opponents (can juggle into {{clr|SA|Supers}}) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Juggle Limit increased 13 → 19 ** Now causes a sliding Hard Knockdown vs. airborne opponents
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** With less than 2 bars of {{clr|SA|Super}} Gauge, changed to {{clr|M|4MK}} ~ {{clr|OD|63214PP}} ~ {{clr|H|2HK}} * {{clr|M|5MP}} ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|E|0}} * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+21}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+24}} * {{clr|M|j.MP}} ** The tip of the arm hurtbox can no longer be hit by cross-up attacks * {{clr|H|Nirvana Punch}} ({{clr|H|1HP}}) ** Reduced knockback vs. airborne opponents, allowing for stronger juggle routes * Charged Yoga Fire (236[P]) ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} ** The start of the transition from regular to charged version delayed 5f → 7f (can hold the button longer without accidentally slowing down the uncharged fireball) * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Fire}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) ** 1st hit deals more hitstun and less pushback, ensuring both will combo ** Reduced body hurtbox during startup and recovery * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Flame}} ({{clr|OD|63214PP}}) ** Expanded the attack hitbox of 1st hit ** Expanded the combo-only hitboxes of 2nd hit onward when the 1st hit connects * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Comet}} ({{clr|OD|j.63214PP}}) ** Fixed issue where if the opponent Perfect Parried the projectile, they would incur Perfect Parry scaling until Dhalsim landed (even when he could act while mid-air) * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236P}}) ** Now deals 792 recoverable gray damage on block, and Drive Damage on Block increased 2520 → 5040 ** Deals 492 Chip damage + 300 recoverable gray damage vs. Burnout ** {{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}} version Recovery decreased 20f → 15f; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-15}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-10}} with increased pushback (usually safe if spaced) ** These changes give Dhalsim a way to safely buffer {{clr|SA|SA1}} in neutral while chipping away at the opponent's health/Drive gauge if blocked ** {{clr|H|HP}} version hurtbox is now crouching height until 3rd active frame (better anti-air)
=== '''Ed''' === * {{clr|H|5HK}} ** Blockstun increased 18 → 19 ** Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Block Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+7}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+8}} ** Mostly relevant when forcing the opponent to stand block after a deep jump-in, since the move is crouchable * {{clr|H|j.HP}} ** Active Frames increased 4 → 5, making it easier to time as a jump-in * {{clr|H|j.HK}} ** Floats the opponent higher as an air-to-air and causes Ed to descend more quickly, making follow-up juggles much easier * {{clr|L|LP Psycho Blitz}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) ** Increased pushback when blocked in the corner, making punish routes potentially more restrictive * {{clr|L|LK Psycho Flicker}} ({{clr|L|236LK}}) ** {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} juggle follow-up timing is 1 frame more lenient * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214P}}) ** Now applies 20% scaling on {{clr|SA|Super}} gauge build until the end of the combo
=== '''E. Honda''' === * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|[4]646K}}) ** Adjusted the pushback of the initial headbutt and the hitbox of the slap animation so that the opponent is less likely to fall out mid-combo ** Increased knockdown time of the initial headbutt so that he is no longer punishable if the rest of the {{clr|SA|Super}} whiffs
=== '''Guile''' === * Sonic Boom ([4]6P) ** Reduced Super and Drive gauge build ** {{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|H|HP}} versions: Super Art gain 600 → 300, Drive gain 1000 → 500 ** {{clr|M|MP}} version: Super Art gain 600 → 450, Drive gain 1000 → 500
=== '''Jamie''' === * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where the damage would increase when the 1st or 2nd hit landed as a {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}}
=== '''JP''' === * {{clr|M|5MK}} ** Hitstun increased 23 → 25 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+11}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+13}} ** Improved combo routes, particularly when canceled into {{clr|SA|SA2}} * {{clr|H|2HP}} ** Arm hurtbox is anti-air invuln from 2nd active frame onward (mostly reverted the nerf from [[Street_Fighter_6/Version/1.04|Version 1.04]]) * {{clr|H|Bylina}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) ** Increased Juggle Limit; reduced the Juggle Increase value on 1st hit * Triglav (22P) ** On a grounded hit, reduced the upward launch by 1 frame and extended the knockdown time by 1 frame ** No change to the total knockdown advantage * Stribog (236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** 2nd hit has more range when 1st hit connects, ensuring both hits will reach * Torbalan (236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Removed projectile collision box after the active frames have ended * Embrace (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) ** Immediate scaling reduced from 25% → 10% when comboed into
=== '''Juri''' === * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** With less than 1 bar of {{clr|SA|Super}} Gauge, changed to {{clr|M|2MP}} ~ {{clr|OD|214KK}} ~ {{clr|H|623HP}}
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range ** Fixed issue where absorbing an attack caused the proximity guard hitbox to disappear on frames 1-17 * Shuriken Bomb (22P) ** Damage scaling reduced from 20% Starter/Combo scaling to 10% Starter scaling only
=== '''Luke''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} / {{clr|L|2LK}} ** Reduced pushback on hit and block * {{clr|M|2MP}} ** Reduced pushback on block ** Can now pressure with blocked {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|M|2MP}} into {{clr|L|2LK}}~{{clr|L|2LP}} to frame trap and punish back walk * {{clr|H|Outlaw Kick}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) ** Retains more {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} momentum for combo consistency * {{clr|H|Triple Impact}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|M|MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) ** Removed 10% immediate scaling on {{clr|M|MP}} ** Increased base damage on {{clr|H|HP}} 600 → 800 * {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} ** Fixed issue where the proximity guard hitbox did not match the full attack hitbox range
=== '''M. Bison''' === * Fixed issue where Psycho Mine could remain embedded after detonation, allowing two activations in one combo ** Applied to {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Crusher Attack}} and Regular/{{clr|OD|OD}} Devil Reverse * {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} ** Reduced horizontal range of the attack hitbox and proximity guard hitbox * Double Knee Press (236K) ** Reduced pushback on block and reduced the recovery hurtbox width by the same amount ** No real change to the punishable ranges, but follow-up combos are more consistent when a punish does connect *** This also makes it harder for M. Bison to set up a spacing trap afterwards ** Fixed issue where if only the 1st hit connected, M. Bison would incur 5f extra whiff recovery that was intended for a fully-whiffed version * Psycho Crusher Attack ([4]6P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) ** Fixed issue where the hurtbox after passing through the opponent was different while in Burnout * Psycho Crusher Attack + Psycho Mine ([4]6P + Mine) ** Can now only be canceled into {{clr|SA|SA3}} after connecting with the opponent *** This fixes an issue where after colliding with a projectile, the Psycho Crusher would whiff along with the {{clr|SA|SA3}} *** Now must connect with the opponent before the {{clr|SA|SA3}} cancel can occur ** Fixed issue where the attack would be canceled mid-animation if it collided with a projectile after hitting the opponent * {{clr|OD|OD Psycho Crusher Attack + Psycho Mine}} ({{clr|OD|[4]6PP + Mine}}) ** After the first 2 attacks are Perfect Parried, the 3rd hit will only trigger a Mine detonation on hit ** Fixed issue where extra combo scaling was applied to follow-ups when only this 3rd hit connected * Backfist Combo + Psycho Mine (214P + Mine) ** Fixed issue where the Mine would detonate when the first hit was Perfect Parried and the 2nd hit whiffed * {{clr|OD|OD Backfist Combo + Psycho Mine}} ({{clr|OD|214PP + Mine}}) ** Detonation occurs 2 frames later and tweaked the hitstun/blockstun properties (less likely to whiff when the opponent is launched high on the screen) ** Fixed issue where the Mine would detonate when any hit was Perfect Parried and later hits whiffed *** The Mine will still detonate after a Perfect Parry if any later hits connect on hit, block, parry, or armor * {{clr|OD|OD Devil Reverse}} / Devil Reverse + Psycho Mine ([2]8K~{{clr|OD|PP}} or [2]8K~P/{{clr|OD|PP}} + Mine) ** Expanded collision box downward after the 1st hit connects ** Fixed issue that caused later hits to occur on the wrong side of the opponent * {{clr|SA|SA1}} ({{clr|SA|236236K}}) ** Fixed issue where the timer would not stop during the attack * {{clr|SA|SA2}} ({{clr|SA|214214K}}) ** Fixed issue that caused the timer to stop for longer than intended after the cinematic on hit ** This also affects other elements like Drive Gauge recovery ** Fixed training mode bug that prevented wake-up reversals from coming out after the cinematic
=== '''Manon''' === * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** With less than 1 bar of {{clr|SA|Super}} Gauge, changed to {{clr|M|5MK}} ~ {{clr|OD|236KK}} ~ {{clr|M|214MK}}
=== '''Marisa''' === * Hurtbox (during Ground Bounce) ** Changed to match other large characters for juggle consistency
=== '''Rashid''' === * Backdash ** Fixed issue where Rashid's collision box was smaller on frames 1-15 * {{clr|L|2LP}} ** Added a head hurtbox on frames 1-7 that is vulnerable only to air attacks (preventing its use as an anti-air) * Nail Assault (Modern Controls: 214X~6X~6X) ** Input adjusted to require holding forward for the final attack in order to prevent overlap issues ** Now easier to perform Assault Roll into an immediate attack * {{clr|M|Assist Combo 2}} ** In Burnout, changed to {{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HK}} ~ {{clr|H|214HP}}~6X~6X
=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|H|Denjin Hashogeki}} ({{clr|H|D.214HP}}) ** Fixed issue where a regular {{clr|H|HP Hashogeki}} would come out if performed while a Hadoken was on-screen
=== '''Zangief''' === * {{clr|M|Knee Hammer}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) ** Blockstun reduced 17 → 16 ** Block Advantage decreased {{sf6-adv|M|-3}}{{sf6-adv|P|(+3)}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}}{{sf6-adv|P|(+2)}} ** Extends a wider body hurtbox from frame 2 onward (no change to leg hurtbox) ** Adjusted Zangief's center axis on frames 2-6 to match visuals more closely * {{clr|H|Headbutt}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) ** Hitstun increased 27 → 28 ** Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+7}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+8}} ** {{clr|DR|DR Cancel}} Hit Advantage increased {{sf6-adv|VP|+15}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+16}} ** Now incurs 25% Starter scaling and 2-hit Combo scaling
